name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses core Java programming knowledge for entry to mid-level developers, covering syntax, OOP, and standard libraries.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measuring 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace performance and style, including interaction with stakeholders.

name: General Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Measures general cognitive ability including verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning to predict on-the-job learning speed.

name: SQL Server (New)
description: Evaluates SQL Server database skills including querying, joins, and stored procedures for developer and DBA roles.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Interactive, game-based measure of inductive reasoning and problem-solving ability, adaptive difficulty.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Customer Service
description: Presents realistic customer service scenarios to assess judgment and decision-making style in service-oriented roles.
